languages.text: "С этого момента и до конца наших дней мы будем замаливать грехи перед Ним еще усерднее... и молиться о вашем долгом здравии".

traits.locale_text: "С этого момента и до конца наших дней мы будем замаливать грехи перед Ним еще усерднее... и молиться о вашем долгом здравии".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "С этого момента и до конца наших дней мы будем замаливать грехи перед Ним еще усерднее... и молиться о вашем долгом здравии".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."
languages.original_text: "С этого момента и до конца наших дней мы будем замаливать грехи перед Ним еще усерднее... и молиться о вашем долгом здравии".

traits.locale_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to atone for our sins before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to atone for our sins before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Von jetzt an und bis zum Ende unserer Tage werden wir noch inbrünstiger beten, um uns vor Ihm zu erlösen... Und ihn bitten, euch ein langes Leben und Wohlstand zu gewähren."
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."

languages.text: "A partir de maintenant et jusqu'à la fin de nos jours, nous prierons avec encore plus de ferveur pour nous racheter devant Lui.... Et nous le prierons de vous accorder une longue vie et la prospérité".
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."

languages.text: "从今往后，我们将更加虔诚地祈祷，在上帝面前赎罪......并乞求他赐予你们长寿和繁荣"
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."

languages.text: "Desde ahora y hasta el fin de nuestros días, rezaremos aún más fervientemente para redimirnos ante Él... Y rogarle que te conceda una larga vida y prosperidad".
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."

languages.text: 「今から、そして私たちの日々の終わりまで、私たちは主の御前で贖罪のためにさらに熱心に祈ります。そして、主があなた方に長寿と繁栄をお与えくださるよう、懇願します。"
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."

languages.text: "Şu andan itibaren ve günlerimizin sonuna kadar, kendimizi O'nun önünde kurtarmak için daha da hararetle dua edeceğiz... Ve size uzun bir ömür ve refah bahşetmesi için O'na yalvaracağız."
languages.original_text: "From now and till the end of our days, we will pray even more fervently to redeem ourselves before Him... And beg Him to grant you a long life and prosperity."
